calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Oct-12-2010 Reset To Oct-26-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Nicole Patrice Apolinario was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication was filed on September 29, 2010.

The Court requires additional information from petitioner in order to proceed with the proposed name change. Good cause appearing, this matter is CONTINUED to October 26, 2010.
